patthana5.2:1.1.pli: Sukhāya vedanāya sampayuttaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca sukhāya vedanāya sampayutto kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana5.2:2.1.pli: Adukkhamasukhāya vedanāya sampayuttaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca adukkhamasukhāya vedanāya sampayutto kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana5.2:3.1.pli: Hetuyā dve …pe… avigate dve. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) (Sahajātavārampi …pe… sampayuttavārampi paṭiccavārasadisaṁ.)

patthana5.2:4.1.pli: Sukhāya vedanāya sampayutto kusalo dhammo sukhāya vedanāya sampayuttassa kusalassa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo.

patthana5.2:5.1.pli: Adukkhamasukhāya vedanāya sampayutto kusalo dhammo adukkhamasukhāya vedanāya sampayuttassa kusalassa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana5.2:6.1.pli: Hetuyā dve, ārammaṇe adhipatiyā cattāri …pe… upanissaye cattāri …pe… avigate dve. (Saṅkhittaṁ. Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana5.2:7.1.pli: Sukhāya vedanāya sampayuttaṁ akusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca sukhāya vedanāya sampayutto akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana5.2:8.1.pli: Dukkhāya vedanāya sampayuttaṁ akusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca dukkhāya vedanāya sampayutto akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana5.2:9.1.pli: Adukkhamasukhāya vedanāya sampayuttaṁ akusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca adukkhamasukhāya vedanāya sampayutto akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana5.2:10.1.pli: Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi. (Saṅkhittaṁ. Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana5.2:11.1.pli: Sukhāya vedanāya sampayuttaṁ abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca sukhāya vedanāya sampayutto abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana5.2:12.1.pli: Adukkhamasukhāya vedanāya sampayuttaṁ abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca adukkhamasukhāya vedanāya sampayutto abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana5.2:13.1.pli: Hetuyā dve, ārammaṇe tīṇi …pe… āsevane dve …pe… avigate tīṇi. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana5.2:14.1.pli: Vipākadhammadhammaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca vipākadhammadhammo kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana5.2:16.1.pli: Vipākadhammadhammaṁ akusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca vipākadhammadhammo akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana5.2:18.1.pli: Vipākaṁ abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca vipāko abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana5.2:19.1.pli: Nevavipākanavipākadhammadhammaṁ abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nevavipākanavipākadhammadhammo abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana5.2:20.1.pli: Vipākaṁ abyākatañca nevavipākanavipākadhammadhammaṁ abyākatañca dhammaṁ paṭicca vipāko abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana5.2:21.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe cattāri, adhipatiyā pañca …pe… aññamaññe cha …pe… upanissaye cattāri, purejāte dve, āsevane ekaṁ …pe… sampayutte cattāri …pe… avigate nava. (Saṅkhittaṁ. Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana5.2:22.1.pli: Anupādinnupādāniyaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca anupādinnupādāniyo kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana5.2:23.1.pli: Anupādinnaanupādāniyaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca anupādinnaanupādāniyo kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana5.2:25.1.pli: Anupādinnupādāniyaṁ akusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca anupādinnupādāniyo akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Sabbattha ekaṁ. Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana5.2:26.1.pli: Upādinnupādāniyaṁ abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca upādinnupādāniyo abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi. (Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana5.2:27.1.pli: Anupādinnupādāniyaṁ abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca anupādinnupādāniyo abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana5.2:28.1.pli: Anupādinnaanupādāniyaṁ abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca anupādinnaanupādāniyo abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana5.2:29.1.pli: Anupādinnupādāniyaṁ abyākatañca anupādinnaanupādāniyaṁ abyākatañca dhammaṁ paṭicca anupādinnupādāniyo abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana5.2:30.1.pli: Upādinnupādāniyaṁ abyākatañca anupādinnupādāniyaṁ abyākatañca dhammaṁ paṭicca anupādinnupādāniyo abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana5.2:31.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe tīṇi, adhipatiyā pañca …pe… āsevane ekaṁ …pe… avigate nava. (Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana5.2:32.1.pli: Asaṅkiliṭṭhasaṅkilesikaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca asaṅkiliṭṭhasaṅkilesiko kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana5.2:33.1.pli: Asaṅkiliṭṭhaasaṅkilesikaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca asaṅkiliṭṭhaasaṅkilesiko kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Sabbattha dve.)

patthana5.2:34.1.pli: Saṅkiliṭṭhasaṅkilesikaṁ akusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca saṅkiliṭṭhasaṅkilesiko akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Sabbattha ekaṁ.)

patthana5.2:35.1.pli: Asaṅkiliṭṭhasaṅkilesikaṁ abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca asaṅkiliṭṭhasaṅkilesiko abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana5.2:36.1.pli: Hetuyā pañca ārammaṇe dve …pe… āsevane ekaṁ …pe… avigate pañca.

patthana5.2:37.1.pli: Savitakkasavicāraṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca savitakkasavicāro kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana5.2:38.1.pli: Avitakkavicāramattaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca avitakkavicāramatto kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … cattāri.

patthana5.2:39.1.pli: Avitakkaavicāraṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca avitakkaavicāro kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana5.2:40.1.pli: Avitakkaavicāraṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca avitakkavicāramatto kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana5.2:41.1.pli: Avitakkavicāramattaṁ kusalañca avitakkaavicāraṁ kusalañca dhammaṁ …pe… savitakkasavicāraṁ kusalañca avitakkavicāramattaṁ kusalañca dhammaṁ paṭicca savitakkasavicāro kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana5.2:43.1.pli: Savitakkasavicāraṁ akusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca savitakkasavicāro akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana5.2:44.1.pli: Avitakkavicāramattaṁ akusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca savitakkasavicāro akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana5.2:45.1.pli: Savitakkasavicāraṁ akusalañca avitakkavicāramattaṁ akusalañca dhammaṁ paṭicca savitakkasavicāro akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana5.2:47.1.pli: Savitakkasavicāraṁ abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca savitakkasavicāro abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana5.2:48.1.pli: Hetuyā sattatiṁsa, ārammaṇe ekavīsa …pe… aññamaññe aṭṭhavīsa …pe… purejāte āsevane ekādasa …pe… avigate sattatiṁsa. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana5.2:49.1.pli: Pītisahagataṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca pītisahagato kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana5.2:50.1.pli: Sukhasahagataṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca sukhasahagato kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana5.2:51.1.pli: Upekkhāsahagataṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca upekkhāsahagato kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana5.2:52.1.pli: Pītisahagataṁ kusalañca sukhasahagataṁ kusalañca dhammaṁ paṭicca pītisahagato kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi. (Sabbattha dasa. Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana5.2:53.1.pli: Pītisahagataṁ akusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca pītisahagato akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana5.2:57.1.pli: Pītisahagataṁ abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca pītisahagato abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana5.2:58.1.pli: Sukhasahagataṁ abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca sukhasahagato abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana5.2:59.1.pli: Upekkhāsahagataṁ abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca upekkhāsahagato abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana5.2:60.1.pli: Pītisahagataṁ abyākatañca sukhasahagataṁ abyākatañca dhammaṁ paṭicca pītisahagato abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi. (Sabbattha dasa. Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana5.2:61.1.pli: Nevadassanena nabhāvanāya pahātabbaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nevadassanena nabhāvanāya pahātabbo kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Sabbattha ekaṁ.)

patthana5.2:62.1.pli: Dassanena pahātabbaṁ akusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca dassanena pahātabbo akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana5.2:63.1.pli: Bhāvanāya pahātabbaṁ akusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca bhāvanāya pahātabbo akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.  (Sabbattha dve. Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana5.2:65.1.pli: Nevadassanena nabhāvanāya pahātabbahetukaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nevadassanena nabhāvanāya pahātabbahetuko kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Sabbattha ekaṁ. Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana5.2:66.1.pli: Dassanena pahātabbahetukaṁ akusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca dassanena pahātabbahetuko akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana5.2:67.1.pli: Bhāvanāya pahātabbahetukaṁ akusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca bhāvanāya pahātabbahetuko akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana5.2:68.1.pli: Hetuyā cha, ārammaṇe dasa, adhipatiyā dve …pe… avigate dasa. (Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana5.2:74.1.pli: Sekkhaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca sekkho kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana5.2:76.1.pli: Nevasekkhanāsekkhaṁ akusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nevasekkhanāsekkho akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Sabbattha ekaṁ.)

patthana5.2:77.1.pli: Sekkhaṁ abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca sekkho abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana5.2:78.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe tīṇi …pe… āsevane ekaṁ …pe… avigate nava. (Sabbattha vitthāretabbaṁ.)

patthana5.2:79.1.pli: Parittaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca paritto kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana5.2:80.1.pli: Mahaggataṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca mahaggato kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana5.2:81.1.pli: Appamāṇaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca appamāṇo kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.  (Sabbattha tīṇi. Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana5.2:82.1.pli: Parittaṁ akusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca paritto akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Sabbattha ekaṁ.)

patthana5.2:83.1.pli: Parittaṁ abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca paritto abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana5.2:84.1.pli: Mahaggataṁ abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca mahaggato abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana5.2:85.1.pli: Appamāṇaṁ abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca appamāṇo abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana5.2:86.1.pli: Hetuyā terasa, ārammaṇe pañca, adhipatiyā nava …pe… aññamaññe satta …pe… purejāte tīṇi, āsevane dve, kamme terasa …pe… avigate terasa. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana5.2:87.1.pli: Parittārammaṇaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca parittārammaṇo kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana5.2:88.1.pli: Mahaggatārammaṇaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca mahaggatārammaṇo kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana5.2:90.1.pli: Parittārammaṇaṁ akusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca parittārammaṇo akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana5.2:95.1.pli: Majjhimaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca majjhimo kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana5.2:96.1.pli: Paṇītaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca paṇīto kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.  (Sabbattha dve. Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana5.2:97.1.pli: Hīnaṁ akusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca hīno akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Sabbattha ekaṁ.)

patthana5.2:98.1.pli: Majjhimaṁ abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca majjhimo abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana5.2:99.1.pli: Paṇītaṁ abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca paṇīto abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana5.2:100.1.pli: Majjhimaṁ abyākatañca paṇītaṁ abyākatañca dhammaṁ paṭicca majjhimo abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana5.2:101.1.pli: Hetuyā pañca, ārammaṇe dve …pe… āsevane ekaṁ …pe… avigate pañca. (Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana5.2:102.1.pli: Sammattaniyataṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca sammattaniyato kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana5.2:104.1.pli: Micchattaniyataṁ akusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca micchattaniyato akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana5.2:106.1.pli: Aniyataṁ abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca aniyato abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Sabbattha ekaṁ.)

patthana5.2:107.1.pli: Maggārammaṇaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca maggārammaṇo kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana5.2:108.1.pli: Maggahetukaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca maggahetuko kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana5.2:109.1.pli: Maggādhipatiṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca maggādhipati kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … pañca.

patthana5.2:114.1.pli: Maggādhipatiṁ abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca maggādhipati abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana5.2:115.1.pli: Maggārammaṇaṁ abyākatañca maggādhipatiṁ abyākatañca dhammaṁ paṭicca maggārammaṇo abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi. (Sabbattha nava. Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana5.2:116.1.pli: Uppanno kusalo dhammo uppannassa kusalassa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo. (Sabbattha ekaṁ. Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana5.2:117.1.pli: Uppanno akusalo dhammo uppannassa akusalassa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo. (Sabbattha ekaṁ. Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana5.2:118.1.pli: Uppanno abyākato dhammo uppannassa abyākatassa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana5.2:119.1.pli: Hetuyā ekaṁ, ārammaṇe tīṇi …pe… upanissaye tīṇi …pe… avigate ekaṁ. (Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana5.2:120.1.pli: Paccuppanno kusalo dhammo paccuppannassa kusalassa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo. (Sabbattha ekaṁ.)

patthana5.2:121.1.pli: Paccuppanno akusalo dhammo paccuppannassa akusalassa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo. (Sabbattha ekaṁ. Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana5.2:122.1.pli: Paccuppanno abyākato dhammo paccuppannassa abyākatassa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo.

patthana5.2:123.1.pli: Hetuyā ekaṁ, ārammaṇe tīṇi, adhipatiyā tīṇi …pe… upanissaye tīṇi …pe… avigate ekaṁ. (Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana5.2:124.1.pli: Atītārammaṇaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca atītārammaṇo kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana5.2:125.1.pli: Anāgatārammaṇaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca anāgatārammaṇo kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana5.2:126.1.pli: Paccuppannārammaṇaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca paccuppannārammaṇo kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.  (Sabbattha tīṇi. Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana5.2:127.1.pli: Atītārammaṇaṁ akusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca atītārammaṇo akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana5.2:128.1.pli: Anāgatārammaṇaṁ akusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca anāgatārammaṇo akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana5.2:129.1.pli: Paccuppannārammaṇaṁ akusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca paccuppannārammaṇo akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.  (Sabbattha tīṇi. Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana5.2:130.1.pli: Atītārammaṇaṁ abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca atītārammaṇo abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana5.2:131.1.pli: Anāgatārammaṇaṁ abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca anāgatārammaṇo abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana5.2:132.1.pli: Paccuppannārammaṇaṁ abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca paccuppannārammaṇo abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.  (Sabbattha tīṇi. Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana5.2:133.1.pli: Ajjhattaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca ajjhatto kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana5.2:134.1.pli: Bahiddhā kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca bahiddhā kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.  (Sabbattha dve. Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana5.2:135.1.pli: Ajjhattaṁ akusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca ajjhatto akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana5.2:136.1.pli: Bahiddhā akusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca bahiddhā akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.  (Sabbattha dve. Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana5.2:137.1.pli: Ajjhattaṁ abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca ajjhatto abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana5.2:138.1.pli: Bahiddhā abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca bahiddhā abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.  (Sabbattha dve. Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana5.2:139.1.pli: Ajjhattārammaṇaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca ajjhattārammaṇo kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Sabbattha dve. Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana5.2:140.1.pli: Ajjhattārammaṇaṁ akusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca ajjhattārammaṇo akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Sabbattha dve. Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana5.2:141.1.pli: Ajjhattārammaṇaṁ abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca ajjhattārammaṇo abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Sabbattha dve. Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana5.2:142.1.pli: Anidassanaappaṭighaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca anidassanaappaṭigho kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Sabbattha ekaṁ.)

patthana5.2:143.1.pli: Anidassanaappaṭighaṁ akusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca anidassanaappaṭigho akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Sabbattha ekaṁ.)

patthana5.2:144.1.pli: Anidassanasappaṭighaṁ abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca anidassanasappaṭigho abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Ekaṁ.)

patthana5.2:145.1.pli: Anidassanasappaṭighaṁ abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca sanidassanasappaṭigho abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Dve.)

patthana5.2:146.1.pli: Anidassanasappaṭighaṁ abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca anidassanaappaṭigho abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Tīṇi.)

patthana5.2:147.1.pli: Anidassanasappaṭighaṁ abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca sanidassanasappaṭigho abyākato ca anidassanaappaṭigho abyākato ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā. (Cattāri.)

patthana5.2:148.1.pli: Anidassanasappaṭighaṁ abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca anidassanasappaṭigho abyākato ca anidassanaappaṭigho abyākato ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā. (Pañca.)

patthana5.2:149.1.pli: Anidassanasappaṭighaṁ abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca sanidassanasappaṭigho abyākato ca anidassanasappaṭigho abyākato ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā. (Cha.)

patthana5.2:150.1.pli: Anidassanasappaṭighaṁ abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca sanidassanasappaṭigho abyākato ca anidassanasappaṭigho abyākato ca anidassanaappaṭigho abyākato ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā. (Satta.)

patthana5.2:151.1.pli: Anidassanaappaṭighaṁ abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca anidassanaappaṭigho abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Satta.)

patthana5.2:152.1.pli: Anidassanaappaṭighaṁ abyākatañca anidassanasappaṭighaṁ abyākatañca dhammaṁ paṭicca sanidassanasappaṭigho abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Satta.) (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana5.2:153.1.pli: Hetuyā ekavīsa, ārammaṇe ekaṁ, adhipatiyā ekavīsa …pe… aññamaññe cha …pe… avigate ekavīsa. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)
